blocks.content: In this milestone, you create `baseline.js` with a ramping virtual user profile: ramp up, steady state, and ramp down.
You'll build a minimal k6 script with `stages` so metrics stabilize during the middle stage.
Replace the URL with the endpoint you want to baseline.
You now have a runnable script whose traffic shape matches ramp, hold, and ramp down.
In the next milestone, you add checks so you measure correctness as well as speed.
